description: User hovers over the Palermo flight marker on the map.
User clicks on the Palermo flight marker to view specific flight options.
The sidebar updates to show Palermo flight details and displays a loading skeleton.
frame_description: Sidebar transitions from city list to Palermo flight details with loading states.

description: User pauses to read the flight options for Palermo in the sidebar.
User hovers over the Turkish Airlines flight option in the sidebar.
A 'Prices are currently typical' information box appears in the sidebar.
